chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1604 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 04-11-2025 Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Manzoor Hussain N.Larik, Advocate for Respondents 4,5,&6 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel appearing for respondents No.4, 5 and 6 files a statement along with four original postdated cheques bearing Nos.00011256, 00011257, 00011258 and 00011260 dated 05-11-2025, 10-12-2025, 10-01-2026 and 10-02-2026 of Rs.358,440, 358,085, 346,086 and 346,087, respectively; issued in favour of the Petitioner. Counsel for the respondents 4, 5 and 6 submits that entire amount has now been paid to the petitioner in the above shape. Counsel for the petitioner affirms the above position and submits that original cheques may be handed over to the petitioner. Accordingly, all the four original cheques are handed over to the Petitioner, namely Naseer Muhammad holding CNIC No.45205-1053844-3 under proper acknowledgment. Since the grievance of the petitioner has now been redressed, therefore, this petition is disposed of; however, it is made clear that, if any of the above posted dated cheque is not encashed, appropriate action will be taken against the signatories in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
